bird.name: 白簇鸊鷉
bird.summary: 白簇鸊鷉（学名：Rollandia rolland）为鸊鷉科南美鸊鷉屬的的鸟类, 分布于南美洲 。 参考文献 外部連結

locations.name: 南美洲
locations.summary: 南亚美利加洲（英语：South America），简称南美洲，为七大洲之一，位於西半球南部（或南半球），西臨南太平洋，西面為太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊。太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊之間的內營力為張力，衍生了東太平洋海嶺；而納斯卡板塊與南美洲板塊的內…

relations.subject: 白簇鸊鷉
relations.evidence: Found in the southern and western South America, its natural habitat is freshwater lakes, ponds and sluggish rivers and streams

relations.subject: 白簇鸊鷉
relations.evidence: morrisoni) has a small population that has significantly declined and it is considered threatened, largely for the same reasons as in the Junin grebe (Podiceps taczanowskii).{{cite journal| last=Dinesen | first=L
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
